T0069.title: Subsidy Recipient Data
T0069.definition: In illicit data trading, personal information or data related to individuals targeted by poverty alleviation programs. After being illegally obtained by underground actors, this data is typically resold to third parties for targeted marketing, fraud, and other illicit activities.

After being illegally obtained by underground actors, this data is typically resold to third parties for targeted marketing, fraud, and other illicit activities.
